creator: jake@checker.org
text:
make install in /usr/port/x11-toolkits/v
dies with:

gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/v/work/v/test'
g++ -o /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/v/work/v/bin/bsd/v1 /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/v/work/v/obj/bsd/testapp.o /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/v/work/v/obj/bsd/vtcanvas.o /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/v/work/v/obj/bsd/vtcmdwin.o /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/v/work/v/obj/bsd/vtcw2.o /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/v/work/v/obj/bsd/vttogdlg.o /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/v/work/v/obj/bsd/vtdialog.o -L/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/v/work/v/lib/bsd -L/usr/X11R6/lib -lV -lXaw -lV -lXaw -lXmu -lXt -lXext -lX11
/usr/libexec/elf/ld: warning: libSM.so.6, needed by /usr/X11R6/lib/libXaw.so, not found (try using --rpath)
/usr/libexec/elf/ld: warning: libICE.so.6, needed by /usr/X11R6/lib/libXaw.so, not found (try using --rpath)
/usr/X11R6/lib/libXt.so: undefined reference to `SmcSaveYourselfDone'
/usr/X11R6/lib/libXt.so: undefined reference to `IceConnectionNumber'
...

Fix: 

add -lICE -lSM to the 

LIBS    +=       -lV -lXaw -lXmu -lXt -lXext -lX11

line in the FreeBSD with gcc section of ConfigX.mk
How-To-Repeat: 
try to build the v port
